assertions.title: Concept Board Data Has Historical Coverage

steps.action: SELECT MIN(trade_date), MAX(trade_date), COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT code) FROM concept_daily

assertions.issues: concept_daily only has ~2 months of data (2026-01-29 to 2026-03-25). MIN(trade_date) = 20260129 is far after the required <= 20240325. The backfill script exists and correctly calls ths_daily() with default start_date='20210101', but the historical backfill has not been executed — only recent scheduler updates are present. Distinct code count (396) meets the >= 300 threshold.

assertions.title: Industry Board Data Has Historical Coverage

steps.action: SELECT MIN(trade_date), MAX(trade_date), COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT ts_code) FROM industry_daily

assertions.issues: industry_daily only has ~2 months of data (2026-01-29 to 2026-03-25). MIN(trade_date) = 20260129 is far after the required <= 20240325. The backfill script exists and correctly iterates dates calling moneyflow_ind_ths(), but historical backfill has not been executed. Distinct ts_code count (90) meets the >= 80 threshold.

steps.action: Read scripts/backfill_concept_daily.py and inspect API call
Verify no AkShare usage for concept data
steps.expected: No AkShare imports/calls for concept historical data
steps.observed: Script imports only TushareClient, not AkShare

steps.action: Read scripts/backfill_industry_daily.py and inspect API call pattern
steps.expected: Code iterates dates and calls moneyflow_ind_ths(trade_date=...)
steps.observed: Script iterates over dates_to_process and calls client.fetch_ths_industry_moneyflow(trade_date=trade_date)

steps.action: Verify date iteration (not just latest day)
steps.expected: Script processes multiple dates from trade calendar
steps.observed: Script gets trading dates via get_trading_dates(), filters out existing dates, iterates each missing date

evidence.codeSnippet:
for idx, trade_date in enumerate(dates_to_process, 1):
    df = client.fetch_ths_industry_moneyflow(trade_date=trade_date)

assertions.title: Concept/Industry Schema Compatible with TuShare Response

steps.expected: Schema has columns for ths_daily() response fields
steps.observed: 21 columns including trade_date, code, name, close, pct_change, volume, amount, open, high, low — covers all critical ths_daily() fields

steps.expected: Schema has columns for moneyflow_ind_ths() response fields
steps.observed: 21 columns including trade_date, ts_code, industry, close, pct_change, company_num, net_amount, net_buy_amount, net_sell_amount — covers all critical moneyflow fields

steps.action: Check concept_daily for NULL critical fields
steps.expected: No NULL in required fields, NULLs acceptable in nullable columns
steps.observed: 21 rows with NULL open/high/low (nullable columns) — acceptable; 0 rows with NULL close/pct_change

steps.action: Check industry_daily for NULL critical fields
steps.observed: 0 rows with NULL close, pct_change, or company_num

steps.action: Verify field mapping in backfill scripts
steps.expected: TuShare response fields properly mapped to DB columns with type conversion
steps.observed: Both scripts use float() conversion with fallback to 0, nullable columns for optional fields, INSERT OR IGNORE for dedup

steps.action: Check backfill logs for insertion errors
steps.observed: No log files found in logs/ directory — cannot verify from logs. However, code has proper error handling (try/except with session.rollback()) and type conversion.

evidence.conceptSchema: id|INTEGER, trade_date|VARCHAR(8), code|VARCHAR(16), name|VARCHAR(64), close|FLOAT, pct_change|FLOAT, volume|FLOAT, amount|FLOAT, leader_symbol|VARCHAR(16), leader_name|VARCHAR(64), leader_pct_change|FLOAT, up_count|INTEGER, down_count|INTEGER, created_at|DATETIME, updated_at|DATETIME, net_inflow|FLOAT, rank|INTEGER, total_boards|INTEGER, open|FLOAT, high|FLOAT, low|FLOAT
evidence.industrySchema: id|INTEGER, trade_date|VARCHAR(8), ts_code|VARCHAR(16), industry|VARCHAR(64), close|FLOAT, pct_change|FLOAT, company_num|INTEGER, up_count|INTEGER, down_count|INTEGER, lead_stock|VARCHAR(64), lead_stock_code|VARCHAR(16), pct_change_stock|FLOAT, close_price|FLOAT, net_buy_amount|FLOAT, net_sell_amount|FLOAT, net_amount|FLOAT, industry_pe|FLOAT, pe_median|FLOAT, total_mv|FLOAT, created_at|DATETIME, updated_at|DATETIME

assertions.issues: No backfill logs available to verify absence of insertion errors during actual backfill execution. Evidence is based on code inspection and current data state.

frictions.description: No backfill log files exist in logs/ directory, making it impossible to verify insertion error absence for VAL-BACKFILL-022 from actual execution logs
frictions.resolution: Used code inspection and data integrity checks (NULL queries) as alternative evidence

frictions.description: The ths_daily() method is not wrapped in a TushareClient helper method — backfill_concept_daily.py calls client.pro.ths_daily() directly instead of going through a wrapper like fetch_ths_daily(). This is inconsistent with the industry script which uses fetch_ths_industry_moneyflow() wrapper.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-BACKFILL-018, VAL-BACKFILL-019, VAL-BACKFILL-022), 2 failed (VAL-BACKFILL-006, VAL-BACKFILL-007). The concept and industry backfill scripts are correctly implemented using the required TuShare APIs (ths_daily and moneyflow_ind_ths) with proper date iteration and schema compatibility, but the historical backfill has not been executed — both tables only contain ~2 months of recent data instead of the required 2-year minimum.
